Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Dec-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
John Lofton (415-957-1800) for Plaintiff/ opposing party 735 Montgomery.
Richard Zuromski (415-659-1966) for Defendant/Moving party Bodyfi.

Hearing is held. Argued re: non opposition and request for leave to amend. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Demurrer To Complaint is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-27-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JOHN NGUYEN, BODYFI, INC., STUDIO2310 SF, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.

TRANSFERRED to be heard in department 501 on the same date and at the same time. That department handles all landlord-tenant lease matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Newton Lam, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/NL)
